signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026, Confirms Contesting 27 Seats with Key Chang
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026, Confirms Contesting 27 Seats with Key Changes Including Women Candidates | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2][5]

IUML announced candidates for 25 constituencies on March 17, 2026, including first-time fielding of two women candidates (Fathima Thahliya in Perambra and Jayanthi Rajan in Koothuparambu), shifting PK Kunhalikutty

signals.raw: YES**—recent March data confirmed, with Bank of Korea holding rates at 2.5% last week (7th meeting) amid oil shocks from Middle East conflict.[1][3]

signals.headline: Goldman Sachs Files for Bitcoin ETF | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Goldman Sachs Files for Bitcoin ETF | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Goldman Sachs applied for its first crypto-related ETF on April 14, 2026, proposing a yield-focused fund holding spot Bitcoin ETFs from other issuers, which could drive institutional demand and move prediction markets on Bitcoin adoption.[1]  
Bitcoin traded at $75,049.79 (up 0.9% in 24 hours) and Ether at $2,376.08 (up 2.4%) as of Ap
matched_markets: Bitcoin Up or Down - April 17, 12:00PM-12:15PM ET

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts—no major new announcement today impacts prediction markets.**[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: MED** confidence—latest sourced update is March 2026 inflation (pre-April 17); no intra-day April releases or resolution
signals.raw: MED** confidence—latest sourced update is March 2026 inflation (pre-April 17); no intra-day April releases or resolutions noted, though energy volatility stokes upside risks.[1][3][4]
